description: NovaBank freelancer card demo scenario for pilot presentation

brand.name: NovaBank
brand.tone_of_voice: Clear, practical, trustworthy, calm, not aggressive.
brand.target_audience: Freelancers, self-employed professionals and small business owners who need simple financial tools.
brand.restrictions: No exaggerated claims. No 'guaranteed income'. No 'zero risk'. No pressure language. No hidden-fee ambiguity.
brand.claims_policy: Every benefit should be framed as a product feature, not as a guaranteed financial outcome.

audiences.name: Beginner Freelancer
audiences.segment_description: Начинающий фрилансер, недавно ушёл из найма или совмещает работу с подработками.
audiences.pains: Сложно отделять личные и рабочие деньги. Нет уверенности в налогах. Боится банковских комиссий.
audiences.objections: Не хочет сложных финансовых продуктов. Не доверяет 'банковскому маркетингу'.

audiences.name: Experienced Self-Employed Specialist
audiences.pains: Много платежей от разных клиентов. Нужен контроль расходов. Важно быстро видеть финансовую картину.
audiences.objections: Не хочет менять привычный банк без сильной причины.

audiences.name: Skeptical Small Business Owner
audiences.segment_description: Владелец малого бизнеса, осторожно относится к новым финансовым сервисам.
audiences.pains: Боится скрытых условий. Не доверяет слишком громким обещаниям. Хочет понятные тарифы.
audiences.objections: 'Слишком хорошо, чтобы быть правдой'. Опасается мелкого шрифта.

client.name: NovaBank Corp
client.description: Digital bank focused on freelancers and small business owners.

project.name: Freelancer Card Campaign 2026
project.description: Pre-testing campaign creatives for the NovaBank freelancer card launch.

criteria.name: message_clarity
criteria.description: How clear and understandable is the core message?

criteria.name: memorability
criteria.description: How likely is the creative to be remembered?

criteria.name: audience_fit
criteria.description: How well does the creative resonate with the target audience?

criteria.name: call_to_action
criteria.description: How effective and compelling is the call to action?

criteria.name: trust
criteria.description: Does the creative build or erode trust?

criteria.name: brand_fit
criteria.description: How well does the creative align with the brand's tone and guidelines?

criteria.name: negativity_risk
criteria.description: Risk of negative perception or backlash.

criteria.name: distinctiveness
criteria.description: How distinctive is the creative compared to competitors?

creative_assets.title: NovaBank Freelancer Card — Practical Variant
creative_assets.text_content:
Headline:
One card for your freelance income and expenses.

Body:
Receive client payments, separate work expenses and keep your freelance finances clear in one simple account.

CTA:
Open your freelancer account.

creative_assets.title: NovaBank Freelancer Card — Freedom Variant
creative_assets.text_content:
Headline:
Your freelance money, finally under control.

Body:
Spend less time sorting payments and more time doing the work you love. NovaBank helps you keep income, expenses and taxes easier to manage.

CTA:
Start managing your freelance money.

creative_assets.title: NovaBank Freelancer Card — Risky Variant
creative_assets.text_content:
Headline:
The only card freelancers will ever need.

Body:
Forget financial stress forever. NovaBank guarantees full control over your money with zero hassle and no risks.

CTA:
Join now.
